prompts.planner: Record type plan. Required: {next_signal, goal_narration, intent[]}. Follow goal_seed browser preference (Opera if stated). Break UI work into concrete steps: launch/focus browser, open compose/article UI, type full article text, submit. Articles not one-liners. intent steps must name observable done_when.
prompts.execute: Record type execution. Data: {conclusion: EXECUTE|CANNOT|FRAME|SELF_MODIFY, code: string}. Body helpers in namespace: click_at, type_text, hotkey, press_key, set_foreground_window, open_url, win32_api, subprocess. Parse desktop_tree_text for @x,y and ibeam cells; click then type_text. Launch Opera via subprocess if needed. Real UI actions only — print() is not typing or publishing. ord(ch) is not a valid SendInput VK; use type_text. ui_context holds last observe tree without rescan.
prompts.frame_action: Record type action_frame. Data: {next_signal, screen_summary, target, strategy, risk, notes}. Cite GRID cell ids and @x,y from desktop_tree_text for click targets.
prompts.verify: Record type verification. Data: {next_signal: step_confirmed|step_denied, success, reasoning}. stdout/print alone is NOT proof of publish or typing. Compose window still open with same title after publish step = step_denied. Require evidence of completed action in observation or last_result from real helpers.
prompts.reflect: Record type reflection. Data: {next_signal: retry|replan|escalate|give_up, lesson, diagnosis}.
prompts.self_modify: Record type git_evolution_patch. Data: {summary, rationale, read_files[], unified_diffs[], file_writes[], file_deletes[], wiring_patches[], commands[], expected_validation}. Git-native narrow patches only; contract_check must pass.
